page.title: Infrastructure
page.description: Aggregate view of compute resources, clusters, and providers in this project.

clusters.title: Clusters
clusters.description: Nodes grouped by their cluster assignment.

empty.title: No clusters yet
empty.description: Assign a cluster name to your nodes to group them here.

providers.title: Providers
providers.description: Cloud providers and regions detected from node metadata.

empty.title: No providers detected
empty.description: Add provider metadata to your nodes to see them grouped here.

settings.title: Compute Control Plane
settings.description: Manage compute tier and disk configuration for this project.

compute.title: Compute size
compute.description: Hardware resources allocated to your database instances.
compute.allDescription: Compare tiers and switch without leaving this page.

disk.title: Disk size
disk.planIncludes: Your plan includes {{total}} GB of disk size for gp3.
disk.advancedDescription: Configure autoscaling thresholds for disk growth.
disk.autoscaleGrowthHint: % of current disk to grow by when threshold is reached
disk.autoscaleMinHint: Minimum GB to add per autoscale event
disk.autoscaleMaxHint: Disk will not grow beyond this limit
disk.note: Disk size includes the database ({{db}} GB), write-ahead log ({{wal}} GB), and system files ({{sys}} GB). Data refreshes every 5 minutes.
disk.spendCapAlert: Disable spend cap to manage disk configuration and access IOPS and throughput controls.

replicas.title: Read Replicas
replicas.description: Deploy read replicas in additional regions for analytics isolation or geo-distribution.

empty.title: No read replicas
empty.description: Add a read replica to distribute read traffic across regions.

sheet.title: Add read replica
sheet.description: Choose a region and compute size for the new replica.

activity.title: Activity
activity.description: Server utilization and disk performance over time.

cpu.title: CPU
cpu.description: Max CPU usage of your server.
cpu.sharedNote: Your compute instance has Shared CPU cores.
cpu.dedicatedNote: Your compute instance has Dedicated CPU cores.

memory.title: Memory
memory.note: You may observe elevated memory usage even with little to no load. Postgres and background services contribute to baseline memory usage.

diskIo.title: Disk IO Bandwidth
diskIo.description: Disk performance is determined by your compute tier's IO bandwidth.
diskIo.note: Smaller instances can burst above baseline throughput for short periods. Beyond that, performance reverts to baseline.
